parameters.subject: =Closing the loop, {{ $('Set Lead Fields').item.json.firstName }}
parameters.message:
=
Goodspeed Studio

Hi {{ $('Log Lead to Sheets').item.json.firstName }},

I completely understand — inboxes can be relentless and I don't want to add to the noise.

I genuinely think we could help {{ $json.company || 'your team' }} save serious time on lead follow-up. But if now isn't the right moment, that's okay.

Closing the loop on my end — but the door is always open. If things change, you know where to find me.

📅 Let's Talk — Book a Time

Warmly,
Your Name
Goodspeed Studio · you@gmail.com

This is the final email in this sequence. Unsubscribe.

value.lastTouch: =Sequence stopped - replied before Day {{ $('Read Status Day 2').item.json.touchCount  +1 }}
=Sequence stopped - replied before Day {{ $('Read Status Day 2').item.json.touchCount  +1 }}

parameters.content:
## Workflow Trigger
Can be triggered by a webhook but right now being triggered by everytime a form is being submitted.

## Email 1 — Day 0 (Initial Qualifier)
The Email is being sent to the lead for the first time and is being recorded in the google sheets for furthur record.

## Email 2 — Day 2 (Gentle Bump)
The Email is being sent to the lead for the second time  and the touch count field is being set to save the record of how many times we have actually sent the email to the lead.

## Email 3 — Day 5 or 7 (Final Call / Break-up Email)
The Second Last Call in our case to our lead.

## Email 4 — Final Nudge
This is the Final Email. After this we are going to mark our lead as unresponsive and not worry about it.
